    def test_delete_user(self):
    
        # 1. DesiredCapabilities + Browser Options
        chrome_options = Options()
        chrome_options.add_argument("--disable-notifications")
    
        driver = webdriver.Chrome(options=chrome_options)
    
        # 5. Open browser
        driver.maximize_window()
    
        # 7. Navigate to URL
        test_url = "https://newsite-qa.matter.in/"
        driver.get(test_url)
    
        wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 30)
    
        # 8. Wait till Matter image is visible
        matter_logo = wait.until(
            EC.visibility_of_element_located(
                (By.XPATH, "//img[@alt='Matter Black Logo']")
            )
        )
    
        # 9. Verify image displayed
        assert matter_logo.is_displayed()
    
        # 10. Click Login
        driver.find_element(By.LINK_TEXT, "Login").click()
    
        # 12. Verify Phone Number field
        phone_field = wait.until(
            EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.NAME, "phone"))
        )
        assert phone_field.is_displayed()
    
        # 13. Enter phone number
        phone_number = "9145496704"
        phone_field.send_keys(phone_number)
    
        # 14. Wait 2 seconds
        time.sleep(2)
    
        # 15. Click Get OTP
        driver.find_element(By.XPATH, "//button[@type='submit']").click()
    
        # ---------------------------------------------------
        # 16. API Request: Validate OTP (POST)
        # ---------------------------------------------------
    
        otp_value = "8319"
    
        validate_otp_url = "https://orbitqa.matter.in/matter-api/v1/auth/validate-otp"
    
        payload = {
            "phone": phone_number,
            "otp": otp_value
        }
    
        headers = {
            "Content-Type": "application/json"
        }
    
        otp_response = requests.post(
            validate_otp_url,
            json=payload,
            headers=headers
        )
    
        print("OTP API Status:", otp_response.status_code)
        print("OTP API Response:", otp_response.text)
